name: Corteva, Inc.
description: Corteva, Inc. is a major global pure-play agriculture company that provides farmers around the world with a complete portfolio of seed, crop protection, and digital solutions focused on maximizing productivity to enhance yield and profitability. The company operates through two main segments: Seed, which develops and supplies high-quality germplasm and traits, and Crop Protection, which provides solutions against weeds, insects, and diseases. Corteva was spun off from DowDuPont in June 2019.
